locator.quote: PPO collapses to NOOP, which is an ABSORBING state (no opens → no reward

text: PPO collapses to NOOP, an absorbing state (no opens means no reward signal on opens means it can't climb back out), so the run dies before learning which trades are right.

locator.quote: the −£196 variance episodes cause violent lurches

text: Diagnosed stability root causes: entropy_coeff 0.01 too weak, no reward-clip (the −£196 variance episodes cause violent lurches), and only 18 episodes.
